title: Velvety Mediterranean Oyster Mushroom Soup
description: A bright, sour yet silky soup bursting with Mediterranean herbs, featuring blanched oyster mushrooms for a touch of luxury and keto-friendly richness.
instructions: Bring a pot of salted water to a rolling boil. Add the oyster mushrooms and blanch for 2 minutes. Drain and let cool, then set aside.
Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add the diced red onion and minced garlic, sautéing until the onion becomes translucent and fragrant, about 3‑4 minutes.
Stir in the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute, allowing it to caramelize slightly.
Add the blanched mushrooms and vegetable broth to the pot. Bring the mixture to a gentle simmer and cook for 10 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Season with oregano, thyme, salt, and pepper. Continue to simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
Using an immersion blender, puree the soup directly in the pot until it reaches a silky, velvety consistency. Alternatively, transfer to a countertop blender in batches and blend until smooth.
Return to the stove, stir in the heavy cream and lemon juice, and warm the soup over low heat, avoiding a rolling boil to preserve the cream’s texture.
Serve the soup hot, garnished with a sprinkle of fresh parsley. Enjoy a comforting, keto‑friendly bowl of Mediterranean flavor.
